problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
